name: codestory
description: CodeStory grounding for Codex over the local codestory-cli stdio server.

interface.shortDescription: Use local CodeStory grounding from Codex
interface.longDescription: CodeStory gives Codex a fast local map and evidence-backed search for the repository in each request. It prepares its managed runtime automatically and keeps setup details out of normal sessions.
defaultPrompt: Where is [SYMBOL] defined and what is the call path into [OWNING_MODULE]?
I am editing a file in this repo. What symbols are affected and what tests should I run first?
Explain how [SUBSYSTEM] works in this repository and cite the files and symbols that own the behavior.
